pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly checking for ~0.30m diameter
Calculated via 2*pi*radius / duration (2*pi*0.15 / 10 = 0.094247... m/s). verifier.py also expects mean velocity around 0.094 m/s.
Task description strictly mandates exactly 10.0 seconds of simulation time.
verifier.py logic directly enforces a minimum of 100 rows in the output CSV.
Explicitly defined in the task description and export_result.sh.
Explicitly defined in the task description and export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that this is a generative synthetic task where the agent must procedurally construct a script to control an IK-ready robot arm in a built-in CoppeliaSim scene. Through mathematical verification of the task instructions (a 10.0s complete revolution with a 0.15m radius), the exact expected velocity is 0.0942 m/s. All requested output paths and minimum required CSV samples (100) exactly match the export scripts and the explicit verifier.py logic.
